/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wno-unused-parameter -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libguanaco.so -o libguanaco.so CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/src/guanaco_manifest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/src/guanaco_steppeloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/src/guanaco_herdcache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/src/guanaco_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/guanaco.dir/src/guanaco_executor.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin: /home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin/libggml.so /home/atomic-germ/Projects/Guanaco/llama.cpp/build/bin/libllama.so /usr/lib64/librt.a
